description: A batch of product has passed final testing and needs a Certificate of Analysis (CoA) to be sent with the shipment.

nodes.task_description: Identify the specific production batch that requires a CoA.

expected_outcome.value: Agent selects the correct batch number.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve all the final quality test results associated with that batch.

expected_outcome.value: Agent pulls the test results from the LIMS (Laboratory Information Management System).

nodes.task_description: Generate the CoA document, populating it with the test results, specifications, and a statement of conformity.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully generates the CoA PDF, ready to be sent to the customer.
